nasb.text: He has sent redemption to His people; He has ordained His covenant forever; Holy and awesome is His name.

esv.text: He sent redemption to his people; he has commanded his covenant forever. Holy and awesome is his name!

cnv.text: 他向自己的子民施行救贖； 他命定自己的約，直到永遠； 他的名神聖可畏。

ccb.text: 祂救赎了自己的子民， 立了永远的约， 祂的名神圣可畏。

csbs.text: 他为他的子民赐下救赎， 他命定他的约，直到永远； 他的名至圣而可畏。
